foolish thoughts from a foolish guy

Hellooooo and welcome to my evil lair where I share whatever I want!!! I just want to preface that I am no writer, in fact I kind of despise writing LOL but I do think it is an important skill to have so maybe I can slowly improve the way I articulate my thoughts through these blog posts! Or I may just end up talking about Childe for 10 hours straight. Probably the latter.

This is also where I dump all my art since I don’t want to clog my gallery up with 5 trillion doodles. It's the only place where I'll share the ugliest drawings known 2 man as well...

Anyways, feel free to peer into my grubby brain and thanks for stopping by!
